textByHashes.deba5ffb2d80dda2aba3a23e2b051d2e179b5555: Most are in the city. As for the rest, hopefully somewhere nicer than this place.
textByHashes.fdd94643f48998ee3821f7901554fad74d3b65e7: Yes. When we heard they were going to lock Menaphos down and shut the gates, most people here decided they'd be better off behind the walls than outside them.
textByHashes.17cec5b5b4488347fa10e686f3d54678c7459399: We didn't get much warning. People had to rush to gather whatever they could. Some things had to be left behind, along with some people...
textByHashes.003bec0a45bde859af46185ef34147cd1af48685: It could have been worse. Had we been in Sophanem, we'd have had no warning at all. I just hope it won't be long before things are back to normal.
textByHashes.43049a7c5bd14c18c337a9d3d717f266bbe7f42d: Thank you, traveller. Stay safe out there. These are troubling times.
